headline: Arcus Biosciences Rethinks Growth After STAR-121 Exit And Gilead Shift
summary: Arcus Biosciences (NYSE:RCUS) ended its Phase 3 STAR-121 lung cancer trial after a futility analysis indicated the study was unlikely to meet its goals. Gilead decided not to continue its broad option rights within the collaboration, changing how the two companies work together on future programs. These developments remove a late stage lung cancer program from Arcus's pipeline and reshape the partnership framework with a key pharmaceutical partner. For investors tracking Arcus Biosciences...
